✌️X-PROTECTOR IS A REGISTERED TRADEMARK – AVOID THE COPIES. SATISFACTION WITH OUR CHAIR PADS IS GUARANTEED! IF YOU DON’T LIKE IT - JUST TELL US. ORDER NOW WITHOUT RISK - PRESS THE BUTTON «ADD TO CART»!
description: Product Description Do you like to see scratches and scuffs on the floor in your lovely home? Imagine that one sunny day You look at the wooden or laminate floor and see it was all covered with scratches by the seats and chairs. How much effort and money will you spend to remove these scratches? Felt furniture sliders for hardwood floors X-PROTECTOR prevent the appearance of such problems in the future and protect wooden and laminated surfaces in Your home from scratches and scuffs! FEATURES OF OUR FURNITURE PADS X-PROTECTOR: HIGH QUALITY – felt chair pads X-PROTECTOR are made of high-quality felt and give to Your floor, furniture, and other surfaces caring solid protection. 1+1 COLORS - You have in the kitchen bright furniture and dark in the rooms? Or vice versa? We considered it - here is a pack of Brown wood floor protectors and a pack of Beige hardwood floor protectors to let You choose pads for all types of furniture. BIG VARIETY OF SIZES FELT FURNITURE PADS: Brown 106 pads: 45 pcs round - 1.9 cm - for small chairs, vases, plant pots, etc. 24 pcs round - 2.5 cm for chair & arm-chair legs. 36 pcs square - 2.5x2.5 cm for arm-chairs, coffee tables legs. 1 pad - 7.5 x10 cm - for heavy furniture – beds, sofa, couch, cabinets, and dressers. You can cut out the shape and size you need. Beige 27 pads: 10 pcs round - 1.9 cm - for small chairs, vases, plant pots, etc 8 pcs round - 2.5 cm - for chair & arm-chair legs. 4 pcs round - 3.8 cm - for table legs. 4 pcs strip - 1.2 x 15.0 cm - for dressers cabinet 1 pad – 11.6 x 15.0 cm - for heavy furniture – beds, cabinets, and dressers. You can cut out the shape and size you need. WE LOVE OUR CLIENTS AND DO OUR BEST FOR THEM! First of all, you need to clean the surface of the object. Then peel the felt pad from the paper and put it on the object. Our chair leg floor protectors have tenacious adhesive which tightly holds pads on the furniture for a long period of time. Now no need to repair the damaged floor. Forget about scratches, scuffs, and annoying noise when you move a chair for example. Beige felt pads will suit most for light furniture. Brown felt pads are the best decision for dark furniture. X-PROTECTOR felt pads suits all kinds of furniture: hardwood, laminate, vinyl, tile floor, and others. IF YOU WOULDN’T LIKE TO CONSTANTLY HAVE TO DEAL WITH SCRATCHES AND SCUFFS ON YOUR WOODEN AND LAMINATE FLOORS AND OTHER FURNITURE, ADD THIS SET TO THE CART RIGHT NOW! ELIMINATE THE POSSIBILITY OF SCRATCHES WITH FELT PADS X-PROTECTOR!
